c.d: The total number of active users on the platform.
c.s: App Annie, Sensor Tower, SimilarWeb, Priori Data

c.d: The simplicity and intuitiveness of the app's interface and navigation.
c.s: App Store reviews, Google Play reviews, expert reviews from tech blogs

c.d: The variety and quality of features available for creating and managing listings.
c.s: Official app descriptions, user reviews, tech blog evaluations

c.d: The fees and commissions charged by the platform for selling items.
c.s: Official platform fee structures, user reports, financial reviews

c.d: The volume of potential buyers visiting the platform.
c.s: SimilarWeb, Alexa rankings, Google Analytics reports

c.d: The measures taken to ensure safe transactions and protect user data.
c.s: Official security policies, user reviews, trust ratings from third-party services

c.d: The quality and responsiveness of the platform's customer support.
c.s: User reviews, official support channels, customer service ratings
